page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Official Guidebook
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project video game by Login Editorial Department. It was published by Enterbrain on 25 December 2004. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/475772151X 

Overview

This book is a guidebook for the video game.
